sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
a little horn; an extremity, an apex, a point

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Feminine of a presumed derivative of the base of G2768; something horn like, that is, (specifically) the apex of a Hebrew letter (figuratively the least particle): - tittle.
